heading: Railroad rights-of-way
label: 24202 Railroad rights-of-way
notes: References in TextThe date of enactment of the Passenger Rail Reform and Investment Act of 2015, referred to in subsec. (a), is the date of enactment of title XI of div. A of , which was approved .Pub. L. 114–94Dec. 4, 2015

Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2015 Amendment note under , Government Organization and Employees.Oct. 1, 2015section 1003 of Pub. L. 114–94section 5313 of Title 5

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Not later than 1 year after the date of enactment of the Passenger Rail Reform and Investment Act of 2015, the Secretary shall submit a proposed exemption of railroad rights-of-way from the review under to the Advisory Council on Historic Preservation for consideration, consistent with the exemption for interstate highways approved on (70 Fed. Reg. 11,928).section 306108 of title 54March 10, 2005

children.heading: .—Final Exemption
children.label: b .—Final Exemption
children.text: Not later than 180 days after the date on which the Secretary submits the proposed exemption under subsection (a) to the Council, the Council shall issue a final exemption of railroad rights-of-way from review under chapter 3061 of title 54 consistent with the exemption for interstate highways approved on (70 Fed. Reg. 11,928).March 10, 2005
